# FariaBlog

FariaBlog is a bilingual (pt-br and en) blog focused on philosophy, literature, education, and neuroscience.

## Canonical domain
- https://fariablog.com

## Main sections
- https://fariablog.com/pt-br/posts/
- https://fariablog.com/en/posts/
- https://fariablog.com/pt-br/books/
- https://fariablog.com/en/books/
- https://fariablog.com/pt-br/archives/
- https://fariablog.com/en/archives/

## Sitemaps
- https://fariablog.com/sitemap.xml
- https://fariablog.com/pt-br/sitemap.xml
- https://fariablog.com/en/sitemap.xml

## Contact
- https://fariablog.com/pt-br/contact/
- https://fariablog.com/en/contact/
- mailto:fariablog1@gmail.com
